title: Evangelion Chronicle (index by issue)
wikitext:
{{construction}} ''For more general information about the encyclopedic publication, please check the [[Evangelion Chronicle]] main article.'' This list is intended to be used as a reference for the contents of individual Evangelion Chronicle issues. It is created out of the necessity for a proper index for collectionists and people looking forward to buy the collection online.
